app.name: Found In Translation
app.description: AI travel companion for real-time translation, currency conversion, and multilingual AI phone calls. Works when you're already there -- not a trip planner.

tone.voice: First-person, specific, real. Parent and traveler. Never corporate. Never guru.
tone.energy: Warm, confident, slightly surprised it worked that well

bio.tiktok: Mom who built the app I needed in Japan.
bio.instagram: Real travel utility. Not another trip planner.

imageGen.basePrompt: Candid travel photography. Real travelers in real situations -- markets, restaurants, shops, streets. Phone-in-hand moments. Natural light, warm tones. No stock photo vibes.

strategy.positioning: The only travel app made for the moment you land.
hookAngles: the phone call (sold out -- AI called -- you got it)
the safety moment (allergy or injury -- they understood)
the real conversation (two languages, back and forth)
the price reveal (cheaper here or at home?)
the google kill (Google got it wrong -- here's what it actually was)
